text: Rust is a systems programming language focused on safety and speed. (Doc #1)
Elasticsearch is a distributed, RESTful search and analytics engine. (Doc #2)
Machine learning models often use vector embeddings for similarity. (Doc #3)
The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. (Doc #4)

Partial match searching can be useful for autocomplete features. (Doc #7)
Case-sensitive search distinguishes between 'Apple' and 'apple'. (Doc #8)
Distributed systems require careful coordination and consensus. (Doc #9)
Cloud computing provides scalable resources on demand. (Doc #10)
